✓ Setter getter

Code


macro createBox()
  let value = 0
  _set: macro(v)
    set value = $v
  end
  _get: macro()
    $value
  end
end

let box = $createBox()
$box._set(42)
$box._get()

✓ rec

Code


macro rec(n)
   if n==0
      macro(x)
         $x
      end
   else
      let f_rec = $rec($(n-1))
      macro(x)
         run $(print(x))
         $(n * f_rec(x))
      end
   end
end

let f = $rec(3)
$f(2)

Bytecode

let first5 = @table
  meta iter: macro()
    parent: $self
    state: 1
    meta next: macro()

        $self.state
        set self.state += 1
      end
    end
  end
end

  $i

✓ iterator (next)

Code


macro seq(a, b)
  state: $a
  stop: $b
  meta next: macro()
    if self.state <= self.stop
      $self.state
      set self.state += 1
    end
  end
end

for i in seq(1, 5)
  $i
end

let t = @table
  - blue
  - red
  - green
end

macro index(t, y)
  for i in seq(1, len(t))
    if t[i] == y
      $i
      leave
    end
  end
end

$index($t, red)

✓ Variadic 1

Code


macro write(...args)
  Positionnals args: $join(...args, sep:\,\s)\n
  Named args:\s
  @join(sep:\,\s)
    for key, value in items(args, ?named)
      - $key\=$value
    end
  end
end
$write(write, paint, song, ink: quill, wing: mark)

Bytecode

  $k -> $v\n
end

  $k -> $v\n
end

a
✓ #358

Code


macro wing(x)
    set x.y = $table()
end
macro nib()
    y: $empty

    meta call: macro()
        if not self.y
            $(wing(self))
        end

        a
    end
end

let t = $nib()
$t()$t()
